description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a broad, flat blade that tapers to a pointed tip. The blade is metallic and has a uniform, silvery-gray finish, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal. The crossguard is rectangular and gold in color, providing a clear separation between the blade and the handle, and likely serves to protect the user's hand. The handle is cylindrical, appears to be wrapped or textured for grip, and ends in a rounded pommel, both of which are also gold or brass-toned. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible engravings or decorative elements. This sword would be suitable for display, ceremonial use, or as a prop in an urban-themed scenario.
description: A straight, broad-bladed sword with a gold crossguard and cylindrical handle, ending in a rounded pommel. The design is simple, metallic, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the straight blade, gold crossguard, and cylindrical handle with rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard and pommel visible as narrow lines.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the broad blade, gold crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, gold/brass-toned, rounded pommel, smooth grip
